fault_hypothesis: Lines 71-72 incorrectly pop the last element when both left and right end with the same value, removing a valid duplicate that should be preserved in the merged result.

constraints.intent: After the pop, merged should still have len(left)+len(right) elements, but the spurious pop makes it one short.
After the then-branch executes the pop, the merged list length must still equal the sum of input lengths.
Before returning merged, its length must equal the total number of input elements.
The returned merged list must contain exactly len(left)+len(right) elements.
